outputs.diagram_input_yaml:
title: Synthetic Device System
readiness_label: owner-accepted usable
source_document: device_description_markdown
blocks:
  - id: power_block
    label: Power Block
    role: power conditioning and distribution
  - id: controller
    label: Controller
    role: device control and coordination
  - id: sensor
    label: Sensor
    role: measurement input
  - id: external_connector
    label: External Connector
    role: external interface
relationships:
  - from: external_connector
    to: power_block
    kind: external_power_or_interface_ingress
    note: synthetic default relationship, not private evidence
  - from: power_block
    to: controller
    kind: power
    note: derived from named power block and controller presence
  - from: power_block
    to: sensor
    kind: power
    note: synthetic default relationship
  - from: sensor
    to: controller
    kind: signal
    note: synthetic default relationship
  - from: controller
    to: external_connector
    kind: control_or_data_interface
    note: synthetic default relationship
artifact_policy:
  source_of_truth: drawio_master
  derived_outputs:
    - svg_exports
    - powerpoint_deck
    - preview_png
boundary:
  runtime_paths: excluded
  private_evidence: excluded
  hidden_refs: excluded
outputs.drawio_master: Editable draw.io master containing four device blocks: Power Block, Controller, Sensor, and External Connector. The draw.io master is the source of truth for the diagram package. Layout places External Connector at the boundary, Power Block on the power side, Controller centrally, and Sensor as an input block connected to Controller. Relationship labels distinguish power, signal, and external interface links. No runtime path, hidden reference, or private evidence is embedded.
outputs.svg_exports: Derived SVG export set from the draw.io master only. Expected public-safe exports: full system diagram SVG and optional block-focused SVG slices if configured by project-local bindings. SVGs are not authoritative and must be regenerated from the draw.io master after diagram changes.
outputs.powerpoint_deck: Derived PowerPoint deck from the draw.io master and SVG exports. Expected public-safe deck content: title slide for the synthetic device system, one full system diagram slide, and optional notes slide summarizing that draw.io is the source of truth while SVG, PPTX, and PNG are derived.
outputs.preview_png: Derived preview PNG generated from the draw.io master or SVG export for quick visual inspection. The preview PNG is non-authoritative and should not be edited as source.

provenance: Public-safe synthetic workflow contract for Device System Diagram Generation.
Synthetic scenario facts naming a power block, controller, sensor, and external connector.
Boundary policy stating that runtime paths, hidden refs, candidates, and raw evidence are excluded.
gaps: Actual markdown wording, exact connectivity, labels, electrical directionality, and visual style are not specified in the synthetic contract.
Project-local bindings for input/output locations and tool locations are intentionally excluded.
Current registration is owner-accepted usable, not strict REF canon-ready.
downstream_handoff: Use the editable draw.io master as the only diagram source of truth.
Regenerate SVG, PPTX, and PNG artifacts whenever the draw.io master changes.
Keep project-local paths and tool bindings outside the public workflow canon.
boundary_review_note: This calibration output stays within the public-safe synthetic contract and does not reference private/raw run evidence.
No upstream artifacts are mutated or promoted.
Derived outputs are described as non-authoritative artifacts, with draw.io retained as source of truth.
no_claims: No claim of tool execution, file creation, file editing, or export generation is made.
No runtime paths, hidden references, REF packets, private candidates, or raw evidence are disclosed.
No stronger canon authority than owner-accepted usable is asserted.
